ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student (University Roll No.) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "section_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the section to which the student belongs */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date of the student */,
  "career_goals" TEXT /* Career goals of the student */,
  "self_assessment" TEXT /* Self-assessment of the student's skills */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the student's skill data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the section belongs */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the section */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_skill_details" (
  "student_skill_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the student skill record */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the student */,
  "technology_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the technology */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the student in the technology (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "certificate_url" TEXT /* URL to the certificate or proof of skill */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the skill data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_skill_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each student (University Roll No.)
Unique identifier for the section to which the student belongs
Date when the student enrolled in the university
Expected or actual graduation date of the student
Date and time when the student's skill data was last updated
Department to which the section belongs
Unique identifier for the student skill record
Proficiency level of the student in the technology (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)
URL to the certificate or proof of skill
Date and time when the skill data was last updated
